queries.name: dbSize
queries.query: SELECT SUM(data_length + index_length) AS value FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()

queries.name: tableCount
queries.query: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'

queries.name: bufferPoolHitRatio
queries.query: SELECT ROUND((1 - (SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads') / NULLIF((SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests'), 0)) * 100, 2) AS value

queries.name: slowQueries
queries.query: SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE AS value FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Slow_queries'

queries.name: topTableSizes
queries.query: SELECT table_name AS name, (data_length + index_length) AS size, table_rows AS `rows` FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() ORDER BY (data_length + index_length) DESC LIMIT 10
